mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAFE(CAFENO, NAME, NAMESUB, CNT, RDATE, SEQNO ,VISIBLE) VALUES(CAFE_SEQ.nextval,#{name},#{namesub},0,sysdate,1,'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT cafeno, name, namesub, cnt, rdate, seqno, visible FROM cafe ORDER BY name ASC, seqno ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE cafe SET visible='Y' WHERE cafeno=#{cateno}
UPDATE cafe SET visible='N' WHERE cafeno=#{cateno}
mapper.select: SELECT cafeno,name,seqno,visible FROM cafe WHERE name IN( SELECT DISTINCT name FROM cafe ) AND namesub='-' AND visible='Y' ORDER BY seqno ASC
SELECT cafeno, name, namesub,cnt,rdate,seqno,visible FROM cafe WHERE name=#{name} AND namesub!='-' AND visible='Y' ORDER BY name ASC
